title: Senior Fleet Manager at Amazon Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Amazon Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Amazon Logistics India! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Amazon Logistics India:
Amazon Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Logistics India!
